results.rendered_html:
paitāmaha (von pitāmaha)
1〉 adj. f. ī
a〉 grossväterlich: tantu  AIT. BR. 7,17 . vaha paitāmahīṃ dhuram  MBH. 1,4166 . dhana  KĀTY.  und  BṚHASP. _in_ DĀYABH.   ŚKDR.  nāman  RĀJA-TAR. 1,76 .
— b〉 von Brahman kommend, ihm gehörig u. s. w.: astra  ARJ. 4,30 . cakra  HARIV. 12730 . vara  R. 1,1,74 . mantra 5,44,16 . ājñā 17. tanu  RAGH. 15,60 . ˚tīrtha  ŚIVA-P. _in_ Verz. d. Oxf. H. 67,a,40 . [Page4-0880] gaṇita  Verz. d. B. H. No. 939 . siddhānta  VARĀH. BṚH. S. 2, Anf.   COLEBR. Misc. Ess. II, 387  u. s. w. ˚bhāṣya so v. a. paitāmahasiddhāntabhāṣya 398 . rohiṇī unter Brahman stehend  VARĀH. BṚH. S. 21,28 . subst. so v. a. rohiṇī 7,9 . 9,2 .
— 2〉 m. Brahmanʼs Sohn: manu  MBH. 1,2581 .
— Vgl. pitṛpaitāmaha.

results.rendered_html:
paitāmaha a. (hī f.) [pitāmaha-aṇ]
1 Relating to a paternal grandfather.
2 Inherited or derived from a paternal grandfather
3 Derived from, presided over by, or relating to, Brahmā;  R. 15. 60. 
— hāḥ (pl.) Ancestors, forefathers.
